title: Chef Aid Mini loaf pan, Non-Stick, Rectangular Bread pan, 13.5 x 6.5 x 3.5 cm Ideal for Small breads, Loaves, Cakes and Pastries, for Individual portions and Desserts, Grey
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean handwash recommended, mini rectangular cake tin is ideal for individual homemade breads, loaves, meatloaf, terrines, or sweet bakes such as lemon drizzle, banana bread, or fruit loaf

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Loaf pan can store cooked goods in the fridge or freezer; Meaning its ideal for prep and leftovers; Simply take the Loaf Tin pan straight from freezer to oven to cook or reheat ideally every time
NON-STICK: Remove baked cakes with ease with this quality non stick coating; Releases cakes and bakes time and time again; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: The cake pan is made from carbon steel which will prevent warping when baking, handwash, fridge and freezer safe
description: From the manufacturer Chef Aid Chef Aid is the brand from the manufacturer George East housewares and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home without compromising on quality Practical and functional, every product is designed for easy use and comfort Non Stick Utensils High quality non-stick utencils designs to be used with our bakeware Tools rest utensil off work surface Can be hung on the pans during cooking Soft grip handles Heat safe to 210 degres Dishwasher safe Chef Aid Bakeware The Chef Aid non-stick cookware range is a well loved and very popular range of products that caters for every individual and offers a complete range of solutions for the home Goldflon non-stick coating Perfect for everyday use Full collection of over 25 pieces in the range Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 4,002 4.4 out of 5 stars 458 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,879 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,879 4.5 out of 5 stars 986 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,829 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £2.80 £ 2 . 80 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 £6.77 £ 6 . 77 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 Types Cake Tins Roasting Trays Baking Sheets Baking Trays Bun Tins Loaf Tins Range 7 sizes and shapes M,L,XL M,L M,L S,L,XL S,M,L Smallest Size 20cm 23x18x5cm 34x26x0.5cm 30x18x2cm 6 Hole Mini Largest Size 24cm 34x28x5cm 31x27x0.5cm 22x21.5x1.5cm 12 Hole 2LB Lof Tin Frying Pans A full range of high quality Frying pans with dual layer of Xylan non stick coating that will be great for all aspects of cooking in the home. Tools and Gadgets A full range of Kitchen tools and gadgets that are produced in high quality stainless steel, Each item has been designed so that they are able to hang up on display or easily store away in the draw. Microwave Cookware A wide selection of cookware designed for use with Microwave's to help make quick food with minimal mess. These items are ideal for the Home or caravan. Knives A full range of contemporary knives with high quality stainless steel blades and soft grip handles. Each knife has been designed with a purpose and will effortlessly perform.
